title: Directors

PART VIII.  DIRECTORS AND OFFICERS

§81.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1979, No. 53, §1; Acts 1993, No. 983, §1, eff. June 25, 1993; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2004, No. 523, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
